_meta.purpose: Frozen team-orchestration pattern catalog for ultraplan --harness (Mix C). The 6 patterns are ABSORBED from the harness taxonomy (github.com/revfactory/harness) as data — the harness plugin is NOT installed and is NOT a runtime dependency (spec 019, FR-4). Closed enum: adding a 7th pattern is out of scope.
_meta.model_policy: Absorbed patterns are de-opus'd: harness hardcodes model:opus on generated agents; here the per-agent model is assigned by the Stage-2 judge from the EXECUTOR POOL only (glm-5.2 | minimax-m3 | claude-sonnet). opus is audit-only; gpt-5.5/codex are NEVER a worker.

patterns.name: pipeline
patterns.shape: Linear chain — each agent consumes the prior agent's output; one path, ordered stages.
patterns.routing_rule: tasks routed to agents in declared order; output of stage N is input of stage N+1.
patterns.guard_placement: guard-reviewer sits between each stage transition.

patterns.name: fan-out-in
patterns.shape: One splitter → N parallel producers → one aggregator. Independent subtasks done concurrently, merged.
patterns.routing_rule: splitter assigns disjoint subtasks to producers; aggregator merges; (v1 dispatch sequential, logical fan-out preserved).
patterns.guard_placement: each fan-out branch has its own guard-reviewer before fan-in.

patterns.name: expert-pool
patterns.shape: A dispatcher selects the right specialist per task from a pool of experts; selective invocation, not all-run.
patterns.routing_rule: a small sonnet dispatcher picks one expert per task by task type.
patterns.guard_placement: guard-reviewer invoked after any expert produces output.

patterns.name: producer-reviewer
patterns.shape: Every task is a producer→reviewer pair (generate then quality-gate). The SAFE DEFAULT.
fit_signals: Stage-2 judge fallback when no design clears threshold
patterns.routing_rule: each task: producer generates, reviewer gates; reviewer IS the guard-reviewer (merged role).
patterns.guard_placement: the reviewer role is the guard-reviewer (clean-code/test/docs).

patterns.name: supervisor
patterns.shape: A supervisor agent dynamically distributes tasks to workers and decides completion.
patterns.routing_rule: supervisor (= sonnet) fans tasks to workers, routes each through the guard-reviewer before marking done.
patterns.guard_placement: supervisor routes every worker output to guard-reviewer before completion.

patterns.name: hierarchical
patterns.shape: Tree of supervisors → sub-teams → workers; recursive top-down delegation. Depth capped at 2.
patterns.routing_rule: top supervisor delegates to sub-team leads (depth <= 2); leads route to workers.
patterns.guard_placement: each sub-team lead reports through a guard-reviewer.
